files.content:
<om-film>
  <style>
    om-film, om-scene, om-shot { display: block; width: 100%; height: 100%; }
    om-shot { position: relative; overflow: hidden; background: #080b10; }
    video { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; filter: brightness(0.48); }
    om-title { position: absolute; left: 7vw; bottom: 9vh; color: #fff; font: 700 clamp(3rem, 8vw, 7rem)/0.95 sans-serif; letter-spacing: -0.05em; }
  </style>
  <om-scene>
    <om-shot>
      <video src="media/hero.mp4"></video>
      <om-title>Compile intent.</om-title>
    </om-shot>
  </om-scene>
  <script type="module" data-om-motion>
    import { gsapMotion } from "onmark/motion/gsap";

    export const motion = gsapMotion({
      title({ element, timeline }) {
        timeline.from(element, { opacity: 0, y: 36, duration: 0.45, ease: "power2.out" });
      }
    });
  </script>
</om-film>

<om-film>
  <style>
    om-film, om-scene, om-shot { display: block; width: 100%; height: 100%; }
    om-shot { position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
    om-shot:nth-child(1) { background: #ff5a36; }
    om-shot:nth-child(2) { background: #7457ff; }
    om-shot:nth-child(3) { background: #1dc98a; }
    video { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; opacity: 0.72; mix-blend-mode: multiply; }
    om-title { position: absolute; inset: auto auto 8vh 7vw; color: #fff; font: 800 clamp(3rem, 10vw, 8rem)/1 sans-serif; }
  </style>
  <om-scene>
    <om-shot id="story">
      <video src="media/a.mp4"></video>
      <om-title>Story</om-title>
    </om-shot>
    <om-shot id="compile">
      <video src="media/b.mp4"></video>
      <om-title>Compile</om-title>
    </om-shot>
    <om-shot id="render">
      <video src="media/c.mp4"></video>
      <om-title>Render</om-title>
    </om-shot>
  </om-scene>
  <script type="module" data-om-motion>
    import { gsapMotion } from "onmark/motion/gsap";

    export const motion = gsapMotion({
      shot({ element, timeline }) {
        timeline.from(element, {
          clipPath: "inset(0 100% 0 0)",
          duration: 0.55,
          ease: "power2.inOut"
        });
      }
    });
  </script>
</om-film>

<om-film>
  <style>
    om-film, om-scene, om-shot { display: block; width: 100%; height: 100%; }
    om-shot { position: relative; overflow: hidden; background: #160808; }
    video { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; filter: brightness(0.62); }
    om-title { position: absolute; left: 7vw; top: 12vh; color: #fff; font: 800 clamp(3rem, 9vw, 8rem)/1 sans-serif; }
    om-cta { position: absolute; left: 7vw; bottom: 10vh; padding: 1rem 1.7rem; border-radius: 999px; background: #ef2929; color: #fff; font: 700 1.25rem/1 sans-serif; box-shadow: 0 0.8rem 2rem rgb(90 0 0 / 35%); }
  </style>
  <om-cues>
    <om-cue id="offer" time="2s"></om-cue>
  </om-cues>
  <om-scene>
    <om-shot>
      <video src="media/offer.mp4"></video>
      <om-title>30% off</om-title>
      <om-cta cue="offer">Buy now</om-cta>
    </om-shot>
  </om-scene>
  <script type="module" data-om-motion>
    import { gsapMotion } from "onmark/motion/gsap";

    export const motion = gsapMotion({
      callToAction({ element, timeline }) {
        timeline.from(element, { scale: 0.8, opacity: 0, duration: 0.4, ease: "back.out(1.7)" });
      }
    });
  </script>
</om-film>
Write native. Render exact.
No tracks
